added: GPT-5.5 model support in the model registry and config injector
Pop-out window session steering: Copilot SDK controls now work in pop-out viewers with per-session state, and clicking a notification opens the matching session
Syntax highlighter overhaul: correct Rust lifetimes, TS template literals and regex-vs-division, JSX/TSX, YAML anchors; ReDoS-hardened with an LRU cache
changed: Adapts to the Copilot CLI 2026-04 settings.json migration — no more parse errors in the global config tab
Better Copilot SDK integration: bridge survives app reloads, pop-outs hydrate from the backend, and streaming deltas render live in chat
More aggressive session preloading: direct UUID path resolution and session caches grown from 10 → 30
Markdown bullets and numbered lists now render correctly in chat
Subagent Panel unified into a single chronological reasoning + tool activity view
fixed: Session File Explorer no longer flashes or scroll-jumps on auto-refresh; new sessions and todos picked up between reindexes
SQLite session-DB viewer: schema tab, resizable columns, cell-expand modal, and always-on headers for empty tables

added: Pop-out session windows: open any session in its own window by dragging a tab out of the strip or Ctrl+clicking a session. Multi-tab viewing with drag-to-reorder, keyboard nav, and persistent tab state
Session File Explorer: browse and view all files in a session's state directory in-app, with type-aware rendering for Markdown, code, JSONL, YAML, and more
System prompt visibility: system.message events (e.g. injected prompts) now appear as a collapsible panel in the conversation view
Structured checkpoint rendering: checkpoints render with collapsible sections and a redesigned compact vertical timeline; compaction events link directly to their checkpoint
changed: Session export now accessible by default from the session panel — no feature flag needed. New presets, raw zip export, and richer Markdown output
Performance: session event parsing is LRU-cached, reindex debounced, FTS health and facet results cached — noticeably faster navigation across views
Session launcher: complex prompts with quotes, backslashes, and newlines now work reliably on all platforms

added: AI Tasks (experimental): define reusable task presets with context-aware prompts and run them through a Copilot CLI orchestrator from dedicated dashboard, detail, and preset-management views. Enable in Settings -> Experimental. Very rough implementation (not recommended yet)
Live session steering via Copilot SDK (experimental): connect TracePilot to an active Copilot CLI session and send follow-up messages from the chat view. Prone to bugs - not recommended for use yet.
changed: Copilot CLI v1.0.24 support: reasoning tokens, request IDs, and subagent performance metrics are now captured more completely
Search and indexing are more robust: CLI search now includes assistant and tool content, with safer index DB maintenance and refresh behavior

added: Skills Manager: create, edit, and import Copilot CLI skills from the desktop — load from disk or any GitHub repository including private repos via gh CLI. Enable in Settings → Features
MCP Server Manager: add, configure, and health-check MCP servers with Copilot CLI-compatible config and a built-in tool browser. Enable in Settings → Features
fixed: Session overview and chat now auto-refresh when background subagents complete
Search results were silently dropped on internal query errors — now surface correctly
CLI showed a stack trace when session state was absent; replaced with a clear error message

added: Session Export (experimental): export to JSON, Markdown, or CSV with presets, section selection, and privacy redaction — enable in Settings → Features
Conversation Chat overhaul: subagent cards with drill-down panels, progressive tool disclosure, and cross-turn aggregation
Parallel session indexing via Rayon for significantly faster startup and incremental indexing
4.8x faster search indexing via bulk FTS5 write strategy
Theme-aware shell renderer: terminal output matches your active theme
Update check on startup now enabled by default for new installations
changed: Structured logging consolidated across the app; silent errors now logged
Smoother loading screen during fast indexing
CSS design system: hardcoded colors replaced with theme tokens
fixed: FTS turn attribution accuracy and duplicate search query prevention
Missing/corrupt workspace.yaml no longer breaks search indexing

added: Search overhaul: tool results indexing (2.5x more content), session-grouped results, FTS health status bar
Token/cost attribution improvements with session activity display
BranchSelector with inline search, custom values, and default reset
Replay turn-load failure surfacing with retry support
changed: Consolidated shared utilities (formatters, chart geometry, SQLite helpers) into @tracepilot/types
Typed IndexerError replaces anyhow::Result in tracepilot-indexer
Split monolithic test file and types/index.ts into focused modules
fixed: FTS wildcard queries and integrity checks
Session start detection and Copilot path warnings
Ctrl+K focus hijack while typing in inputs
Timeline overlap detection

added: Search browse mode with presets (All Errors, User Messages, Tool Calls) and event-level deep-linking to exact tool calls
Unified Session View in Agent Tree with failure reasons and expandable outputs
Worktree favourites
Accessibility: focus trap, ARIA semantics, and keyboard navigation in search palette and tabs
changed: Security hardening: tightened CSP and trimmed Tauri capabilities
Typed error handling: all Tauri commands return structured BindingsError instead of raw strings
Modular Rust backend: split monolithic lib.rs into domain command modules
Read-only DB connections for all query operations
Significant deduplication: shared composables, formatters, chart styles, and SQL helpers
fixed: Race conditions in preferences, search facets, and session detail loads
Turn model attribution no longer inherits from subagent child tool calls
FTS query sanitisation for special characters
Setup wizard restart when shutdown midway through
External link handling, CLI argument validation, TypeScript/Rust type alignment

added: Full-text search with global Ctrl+K palette, dedicated search view with filters, facets, and deep-link to matching turn
Session replay overhaul with transport controls, event ticker, step navigator, and model-switch banner (enable in settings)
In-app auto-updater with progress bar and one-click relaunch for installed builds (will go live when repo becomes public)
Launcher template system: new defaults (Code Review, Write Tests), emoji icons, dismissable defaults, and usage tracking
Content width presets and UI scale slider in Settings → Appearance
Markdown rendering in conversation, replay, and tool results (opt-in via Settings)
Session Plan card on Overview tab with expandable checkpoint content
Structured logging with Settings → Logs & Diagnostics for viewing, exporting, and configuring log level
Session data optimization: LRU cache, freshness-based refresh, and trimmed IPC payloads
One-click CLI interactive session launch with prompt from the app
changed: App-wide toast notifications and styled confirm dialogs replace browser alerts
Session list cards redesigned with icon stats and restructured toolbar
Config Injector: batch backup, diff preview for restores, and improved reset defaults
fixed: Chart layout and number/cost formatting across analytics views
Worktree create modal repo picker and auto-branch loading in All Worktrees mode
Factory reset ghost config.toml that skipped the setup wizard
Security hardening: path traversal, SQL injection, file size limits, env var validation

added: Orchestration (preview): launch Copilot sessions, manage worktrees, and inject config from the desktop app
Config injection: set default models for subagents to increase their effectiveness
Git worktree management with repo registry, disk usage tracking, and lock/unlock
Session incidents: health issues now surface in the overview and analytics views
Compaction and rate limit events are now visible in the conversation view
What's New: click the version in the sidebar to revisit release notes anytime
Windows installer and standalone exe now included in GitHub releases
Feature flags: opt in to experimental features from Settings
changed: Analytics views load faster with shared utilities under the hood
Preferences now load reliably at startup
fixed: Launched terminal sessions no longer close when you quit TracePilot
Agent Tree and Todo dependency graph rendering issues
External links now open correctly in your default browser

added: Session explorer with searchable, filterable card grid and full-text search
Conversation viewer with Chat, Compact, and Timeline modes
19 specialized tool renderers (diffs, grep, shell, SQL, web search, and more)
Analytics dashboards: token usage, tool analysis, code impact, model comparison
Cost tracking with configurable Copilot and wholesale API pricing
Update detection with opt-in GitHub API check and What's New modal
CI/CD workflows, conventional commits, and automated release pipeline
